nasb.text: As for the Izharites, Chenaniah and his sons were assigned to outside duties for Israel, as officers and judges.

esv.text: Of the Izharites, Chenaniah and his sons were appointed to external duties for Israel, as officers and judges.

cnv.text: 以斯哈家族有基拿尼雅和他的眾子在聖殿外作官長和審判官，治理以色列人。

ccb.text: 以斯哈族的基拿尼雅及其众子做官长和士师，为以色列管理圣殿以外的事务。
